MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF ANTHONY HELD AND DEFENDANT CROSS CANVAS COMPANY, INC'S (JOINT) MOTION FOR APPROVAL OF PROP 65 SETTLEMENT. No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: granted. No opposition filed and settlement complies with H & S 25249.7 (f)(4). Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
